reflection.candidate_lesson: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView returns zero confirming signals, treat the 75% sizing multiplier as a hard ceiling AND require the 30-indicator conviction to exceed 55% before entry — internal-only MOMENTUM below that conviction is the weakest configuration in the confirmation stack.
reflection.mechanism: A MOMENTUM regime call with no external confirmation means only the internal ensemble sees the move; institutionally, durable momentum leaves a footprint across multiple venues/timeframes, so the absence of TV agreement signals the move is being carried by a single crowded flow that reverts once that flow exhausts. Low internal conviction (<55%) on top of that means even the internal ensemble is split — you are sizing into noise dressed as trend.
reflection.testable_rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0 and consensus_conviction < 0.55: veto_entry() else if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0: size *= 0.75

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
